---
name: Performance report
about: Submit a boundary-specific reproducible benchmark
title: "[performance] "
labels: performance
---

## Boundary

State exact start/end timestamps. Do not mix transport-only and full-transaction results.

## Environment

Release, binary hash, Windows version, CPUs/affinity, payload, concurrency, warm-up, sample count.

## Results

P50 / P95 / P99 / max / failures / backpressure:

## Commands and raw evidence

Provide exact commands and attach sanitized raw samples.
